testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None in ['church_admin', 'admin'] + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbc40>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbc40> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbe00>('user', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbe00> = {'access_token': 'sess_458eb6463d7c439cb86bcaae8edac306', 'accessible_campuses': [{'id': 'abundant-east-001', 'name': 'Abundant East'}, {'id': 'abundant-downtown-001', 'name': 'Abundant Downtown'}, {'id': 'abundant-west-001', 'name': 'Abundant West'}], 'email': 'shannonnieman1030@gmail.com', 'name': 'Shannon Nieman', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_phase4.py:53: in test_admin_login assert data.get("user", {}).get("role") in ["church_admin", "admin"] E AssertionError: assert None in ['church_admin', 'admin'] E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbc40>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbc40> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbe00>('user', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffd91f0bbe00> = {'access_token': 'sess_458eb6463d7c439cb86bcaae8edac306', 'accessible_campuses': [{'id': 'abundant-east-001', 'name': 'Abundant East'}, {'id': 'abundant-downtown-001', 'name': 'Abundant Downtown'}, {'id': 'abundant-west-001', 'name': 'Abundant West'}], 'email': 'shannonnieman1030@gmail.com', 'name': 'Shannon Nieman', ...}.get
